temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair and a mustache, his face wet with sweat and grimy. He wears a black leather jacket. Another person's hand, covered in blood, is seen gripping his throat, squeezing tightly. The background is dark and indistinct, suggesting a dimly lit, possibly outdoor or confined space. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera is shaky, enhancing the sense of struggle and urgency. The audio is filled with the raw, visceral sounds of a man in extreme distress. He gasps and coughs violently, his breaths sharp and choked, as if he's being held in a tight grip. The camera angle shifts to an extreme close-up, looking down at the bloody hand squeezing the man's throat. The hand, with red-stained fingers, is the central focus. The man's neck and the collar of his black jacket are visible, also stained with blood. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera returns to a close-up of the man's face. His expression is one of intense pain and desperation as he looks slightly off-camera. The other person's hand is still visible, maintaining the chokehold. The lighting is low, casting shadows across the man's face. The "风行网" text is still present. Through gritted teeth, he manages to whisper urgently, "快走" (Kuài zǒu), which translates to "Go quickly." His voice is strained and weak, conveying a sense of panic and desperation, as if he's trying to both escape and get someone else to leave while he endures the attack. The scene is devoid of any background music, making the sounds of his struggle and pained breathing the central focus of the audio.
